row.html:
Welcome to Splunk for CA SiteMinder
The Splunk for CA SiteMinder app comes built with some useful out of the box inputs, dashboards, custom views, and saved searches.
This app can be used on a Splunk indexer or in a Splunk forwarding configuration where the app will capture metrics, logs, and configuration changes across your infrastructure.
Important - all data in the unix app is by default in its own index named "casm". To search for CA SiteMinder data be sure to include "index=casm" in your search.

Before to start - Add data inputs to Splunk from CA SiteMinder Policy Server smaccess and smps log files. See example from Overview CA SiteMinder Data inputs help. Install Google Maps for Splunk Add-on for display the results on the map.
This App has been created by BSC Consulting S.p.A. - Via Mentore Maggini, 50 00143 - Roma - Italy - Tel. +39 06 51957867 Fax +39 06 51957870 - splunk@bsc.it.
